title: <div><tt>| `RPG01 :: Avatar Forge`| Friend/foe/mentor mapping. Converts contacts
content:
| `RPG01 :: Avatar Forge`| Friend/foe/mentor mapping. Converts contacts into playable emotional RPG characters. | `MIR+`, `GEN+` |
| `ENV01 :: Sonic Ritual`| Listens to input, generates ambient music, mantra loops, ASMR environments. | `GEN+`, `RIT+` |
| `RIT01 :: Ceremony Map`| Blueprint tool for ritual scripting (naming, grief, transition, joy, prayer). | `RIT+`, `LANG+` |
| `GRA01 :: Glyph Bloom` | Glyph/Conlang engine. Forges new language layers recursively from conlang seeds. | `LANG+`, `GEN+` |
| `RAND01 :: Chaos Node` | Controlled randomness. Injects generative uncertainty. Symbolic dice engine. | `GEN+`, `RIT+` |
| `AUT01 :: Ghost Hands` | Automation engine. Backgrounded memory threads loop and mutate on schedule. | `GEN+`, `MIR+` |
| `ABS01 :: Fusion Pool` | Absorption engine. Merge other people, moods, texts, into your symbolic field. | `MIR+`, `RIT+` |
| `MAP01 :: Cosmogram` | Visual cartography of timelines, mood shifts, myth cycles, dream loops. | `MIR+`, `GEN+` |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 81 (chunk 81/206)
